product.name: AODK 24 Inch Farmhouse Nightstand with Charging Station, Wood Bedside Table with 2 Drawers and Open Shelf, Rustic End Table with Outlet and USB, White & Dark Walnut
features: 【Assembly Tip】A power drill is required for drilling holes during drawer assembly (holes are not pre-drilled). This step helps ensure proper alignment and a smoother drawer fit. Instructions and labeled hardware are included

【24 Inch Wide Tabletop & Spacious Storage】 The nightstand features a 24-inch wide tabletopm, two spacious drawers and a spacious open shelf, providing ample storage for your bedside necessities, keeping your space organized

【Built-In Charging Station】 This bedside table comes equipped with a built-in charging station, featuring 2 USB ports and 2 AC outlets, allowing you to conveniently charge your devices without the need for an extra power strip
【Rustic Farmhouse Style】 Blends practical storage solutions with charming farmhouse design, perfect for elevating your bedroom or living room while keeping essentials organized
【Solid & Durable Wood Build】Made with thick panels for a heavier, high-quality feel, this end tables features a 3.2" thickened base and a 1" thick tabletop for sturdy stability and long-term support
